Φ1.drift_behavior: Contracts, loses inner glow, becomes shadow orb.

Φ2.drift_behavior: Desyncs, snaps out of alignment, flickers or vibrates.

Φ3.motion_behavior: Curved acceleration arc with lift and flame shimmer.
Φ3.drift_behavior: Spiral unwinds, breaks symmetry, overdesire feedback.

Φ4.motion_behavior: Pulse-hold and snap; angular tension stretch.
Φ4.drift_behavior: Cracks appear; edges distort; may shatter into crystal web.

Φ5.motion_behavior: Ripple decay, downward drift, entropy scatter.
Φ5.drift_behavior: Breaks into noise field or static burst.

Φ6.drift_behavior: Freezes over; inner glow extinguished; frost ripple.

Φ7.motion_behavior: Base-to-apex vector surge; outward voice ripple.
Φ7.drift_behavior: Tip bends; echo folds back; voice becomes noise or silence.

Φ8.motion_behavior: Rapid burst, spike flash, electric arcs.
Φ8.drift_behavior: Erratic spikes, overbright burn, static collapse.

Φ9.motion_behavior: Smooth recursive loop with inward pull and lift.
Φ9.drift_behavior: Feedback collapse; loop rupture; fragmentation into cold storage.
